---
title: "Multivariable calculus: Exercises"
toc: true
---

# 18 The definite integral of a function of two variables

Attempt as many of problems 1-15 odd in [this](./text/18ex-the-definite-integral-of-a-function-of-two-variables.pdf){target="_blank"} file. The solutions are [here](./text/18ex-the-definite-integral-of-a-function-of-two-variables-sol.pdf){target="_blank"}, under the heading Section 16.1.
